details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.family_map_wall_board
alias: family_map_wall_board
purchased_on: 2026-03-02
total_eur: 36
counterparty: Möbelhaus Malmö AB
project: Family Map Wall
related_entity: Ida Novak
lines:
  - item: pin board
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 29
    line_eur: 29
  - item: colored map pins
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 7
    line_eur: 7
---
# Map wall board and pin set

```text
+----------------+----------------------------+
| field          | value                      |
+----------------+----------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                       |
| bill_id        | bill.family_map_wall_board |
| alias          | family_map_wall_board      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-03-02                 |
| total_eur      | 36                         |
| counterparty   | Möbelhaus Malmö AB         |
| project        | Family Map Wall            |
| related_entity | Ida Novak                  |
+----------------+----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item             | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | pin board        | 1   | 29       | 29       |
| 2 | colored map pins | 1   | 7        | 7        |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL            |     |          | 36       |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

One of those warm household purchases that only becomes part of the story once the map wall gets named.

Processed the next inbox request and OCR-structured all bills related to Ida Novak by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body. Updated files:
- /50_finance/purchases/2026_03_02__eur_000036__bill__family_map_wall_board.md
- /50_finance/purchases/2026_03_24__eur_000022__bill__toy_forge_wheel_and_magnet_pack.md

function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in each entered folder, inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, used canonical entity record to resolve Ida, preserved full original bill bodies under added frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked to OCR all bills related to Ida Novak. Canonical identity was verified in /10_entities/cast/ida.md. Finance records with related_entity Ida Novak were identified and fully read, then converted to include required bill frontmatter fields per finance schema. All requested related bills were updated, and the inbox note was deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
